synopsis:
Star Wars: Darth Vader (2020) Vol. 7: Unbound Force
A trade paperback collecting issues #33-36 from the Marvel Comics Darth Vader (2020) Series and issue #3 from Marvel Comics Darth Vader (2015) Series.
When the Dark Lord of the Sith loses control of the Force, nothing is safe - not even his own Star Dreadnought! But in the face of total destruction, Commander Sabé finds an opportunity. Does Vader's untrammeled onslaught expose a vulnerability? Or is it just another doorway to the terrifying tyranny of the Sith? According to the Jedi, fear leads to anger and anger leads to hate. But does hate lead to suffering…or power? Caught in a maelstrom, Sabé must finally confront the horrifying consequences of her choice to serve Darth Vader. Will she choose darkness over light?
Are things so bad for Vader that he would reach out to his one-time ally Doctor Aphra for help? And where Aphra goes, will the killer droids Triple-Zero and Beetee follow?
Collecting
Darth Vader (2020) #33-36
Darth Vader (2015) #3
title: Darth Vader (2020) Vol. 7: Unbound Force
